subject: [For Ian Approval] [PHCB] Base commission adjustments for 1 Jan 2026
deck_filename: Shopee Mobile Mail - [For JH Approval] [PHCB] Base commission adjustments for 1 Jan 2026.pdf

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

In line with PH platform direction to further increase our take rate, PHCB
would like to recommend an increase in base commission rates *effective 1
Jan 2026* (same time as other CB markets). Changes are as follows:

[image: image.png]

The changes above are projected to yield a *+0.17% increase in platform
take rate* (+0.88% to CB take rate), translating to about *$1.8m per month*.
Changes will be applied across the board, regardless of seller origin and
type.

Attached below are Autumn, Vincent, and Jianghong's approvals. Seeking your
approval for the proposed changes. And for any questions or clarifications,
please let us know.

Thank you,
Kevin

-- 
*Bert Kevin Chan*
Shopee | Business Development | Cross Border
*Mobile:* +63 925 305 0306
*Address:* 48F The Podium West Tower, 12 ADB Avenue, corner Dona Julia
Vargas Avenue, Ortigas Center, Mandaluyong City

content.question: thanks, this is only for CNCB?

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Proposal is to increase for all PHCB sellers, including KRJP. This is
following previous seller fee adjustments where we adjusted rates for all
sellers as well.

Thank you,
Kevin
